ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project */,
  "project_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the project */,
  "project_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the user leading the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the project */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file in the codebase */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was last updated */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash value of the file */,
  "file_content" TEXT /* Content of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverage_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage report */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file the report belongs to */,
  "coverage_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of code covered by tests */,
  "total_lines" INTEGER /* Total number of lines in the file */,
  "relevant_lines" INTEGER /* Number of relevant lines (lines that can be covered by tests) */,
  "lines_covered" INTEGER /* Number of lines covered by tests */,
  "lines_missed" INTEGER /* Number of lines missed by tests */,
  "avg_hits_per_line" REAL /* Average number of hits per line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "test_framework" TEXT /* Testing framework used */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results of the tests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_reports_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version the test run belongs to */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date and time the test run was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test run (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test run in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the test run was created */,
  "run_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the tests were run */,
  "run_config" TEXT /* Configuration used for the test run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file the test case belongs to */,
  "test_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the test case was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the test case was last updated */,
  "case_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test case */,
  "case_tags" TEXT /* Tags or labels for the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test run the result belongs to */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case the result belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test case execution (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test case execution in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the test result was created */,
  "result_message" TEXT /* Message for the test result */,
  "result_stack_trace" TEXT /* Stack trace for the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-project relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., developer, lead) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  "user_project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the user's involvement in the project */,
  "user_project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the user's involvement in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_versions" (
  "user_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-version relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the version (e.g., developer, tester) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  "user_version_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the user's involvement in the version */,
  "user_version_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the user's involvement in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the file type (e.g., controller, model, view) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file type */,
  "type_icon" TEXT /* Icon for the file type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the file category (e.g., admin, user, system) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file category */,
  "category_icon" TEXT /* Icon for the file category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_versions" (
  "file_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the file */,
  "commit_id" TEXT /* Commit ID from the version control system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file version was last updated */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comment for the file version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverage_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage threshold */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version */,
  "threshold_percentage" REAL /* Minimum coverage percentage required for the project or version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the threshold was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the threshold was last updated */,
  "threshold_warning_level" TEXT /* Warning level for the coverage threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_thresholds_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_thresholds_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)
